synopsis:
This is the forty-seven issue from the Marvel Comics Darth Vader (2020) Series
THE RAZING OF EXEGOL CONTINUES!
DARTH VADER and the SCHISM IMPERIAL launch their boldest challenge to the power of PALPATINE with an assault on EXEGOL, the home of the EMPEROR'S greatest secrets and treasures! But if sheer brute force can't overcome the defenses of the SITH CITADEL, what terrifying new resources will the DARK LORD draw upon?
Also: CAPTAIN ENRIC PRYDE faces his greatest test!
title: Darth Vader (2020) #47
